title: BluePeak deployment note
body: BluePeak can be delivered as EU-hosted SaaS, UK-hosted SaaS, private cloud, or on-premise.

title: BluePeak Flow feature note
body: BluePeak Flow is used for configurable workflow automation and case management including approvals, exceptions, service requests, SLAs, rules, task routing, and audit trails.

title: BluePeak Vault feature note
body: BluePeak Vault supports secure external document exchange with controlled access, versioning, and submission checklists for suppliers, carriers, brokers, and customers.

title: BluePeak Pulse feature note
body: BluePeak Pulse provides dashboards, KPI reporting, operational analytics, and governed exports for managers, analysts, and operational teams.
